bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught

bugs.error_message: MonthlyPlan: saved plan list empty on mount; clicking saved plan only changed month input, didn't load plan data
bugs.root_cause: loadPlanList was never called on mount; saved plan button only called setTargetMonth, not a plan-fetch function
bugs.fix: Converted loadPlanList to useCallback, added useEffect to call it on mount; added loadPlan(month) that fetches GET /api/plans/:month and populates planData

bugs.error_message: Publisher revalidate only sent path:'/' instead of actual article paths and tags
bugs.root_cause: POST /api/publish sent a static body {ts, path:'/'} to /api/revalidate instead of building real article paths from slugBase
bugs.fix: Read slugBase from meta, build paths array [/tr/series/.., /en/series/..] and tags array [article:id, series:slug, list, sitemap, feed:tr, feed:en]

bugs.root_cause: id: 'resume', label: 'Resume Studio' → 'resume',  label: 'Resume Studio',   hint: 'PDF üret + JSON önizle'
bugs.fix: Changed id: 'resume', label: 'Resume Studio' → 'resume',  label: 'Resume Studio',   hint: 'PDF üret + JSON önizle'

bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: apply_patch verification failed while adding a missing .wolf/anatomy.md entry for the RAG prompt outline
bugs.root_cause: The initial patch context used terminal-displayed mojibake/normalized text instead of the file's exact Unicode content.
bugs.fix: Re-read the precise context with Select-String and applied the anatomy update using the exact stored text.

bugs.error_message: apply_patch verification failed while adding llm-nasil-calisir anatomy entries from stale or Unicode-sensitive context
bugs.root_cause: The first anatomy update patches used surrounding lines that did not exactly match the current file content and Unicode dash/description text.
bugs.fix: Used the ASCII-only heading `## content/series/2026-07-bagimsiz/` as the patch anchor and inserted the new llm-nasil-calisir article entries before it.

bugs.error_message: apply_patch verification failed while updating .wolf/anatomy.md and .wolf/buglog.json with localized context lines
bugs.root_cause: Patch context used localized or stale tail lines that did not match the current file contents exactly.
bugs.fix: Used simpler exact anchors for anatomy and structured JSON append for the bug log.

bugs.error_message: Get-Date : A parameter cannot be found that matches parameter name 'AsUTC'.
bugs.root_cause: This PowerShell version does not support the Get-Date -AsUTC parameter.
bugs.fix: Used (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o') to produce an ISO UTC timestamp.

bugs.error_message: Publisher batch QC request for 2026-07-bagimsiz: five article scaffolds needed blocker fixes before Publisher could be ready
bugs.root_cause: The series had brief/meta/outline scaffolding but was missing bilingual final MDX files and references.json files required by meta.languages and reference QC for explainer/research/architecture TechArticle content.
bugs.fix: Created final.tr.mdx, final.en.mdx, and references.json for articles 01-05; added references to the essay warning case; normalized article 04 slugBase.

bugs.error_message: SyntaxError: Invalid regular expression: /?/g: Nothing to repeat
bugs.root_cause: Turkish regex literals in a PowerShell-fed inline Node script were corrupted into question marks before Node parsed the script.
bugs.fix: Re-ran the validation script using Unicode escapes for Turkish characters.

bugs.error_message: apply_patch verification failed while updating .wolf/cerebrum.md with terminal-displayed localized context
bugs.root_cause: The first cerebrum patch used localized/mojibake context that did not exactly match the file bytes.
bugs.fix: Applied smaller patches anchored on ASCII-stable lines.

bugs.error_message: llm-nasil-calisir Publisher QC showed 2 blockers per article because references.json was missing for TR and EN
bugs.root_cause: The five TechArticle explainer/architecture article scaffolds had meta/brief files but no references.json, while runQC requires references for those content types.
bugs.fix: Added references.json to all five llm-nasil-calisir article directories using the sourceBasis papers/docs from each brief.

bugs.error_message: Error [ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND]: Cannot find module 'C:\dev\nacianilcom\packages\content-core\dist\schemas\index' imported from C:\dev\nacianilcom\packages\content-core\dist\index.js
bugs.root_cause: Direct Node ESM import of the compiled content-core dist entry cannot resolve extensionless internal dist imports in this environment; a separate root-level inline validation also could not resolve zod because pnpm strict layout does not expose package dependencies from the repository root.
bugs.fix: Validated actual resume and case JSON from packages/content-core working directory with an inline Zod schema matching packages/content-core/src/schemas/resume.ts; targeted vitest resume tests also passed.

bugs.root_cause: TDD RED step intentionally added tests before the password-gate helper existed.
bugs.fix: Implemented apps/web/src/lib/password-gate.ts with SHA-256 password verification, HMAC signed sessions, expiry checks, and safe next paths; targeted vitest now passes.

bugs.error_message: Get-Content : An object at the specified path apps/web/app/[lang]/page.tsx does not exist, or has been filtered by the -Include or -Exclude parameter.
bugs.file: PowerShell file reads for apps/web/app/[lang] route files
bugs.root_cause: PowerShell treated the bracketed Next.js route folder `[lang]` as a wildcard pattern.
bugs.fix: Re-read bracketed route files with Get-Content -LiteralPath.

bugs.error_message: Module not found: playwright; Cannot find package 'playwright-core' imported from bundled playwright index.mjs
bugs.root_cause: The Node REPL environment did not have project Playwright installed, and the bundled runtime exposed playwright without the matching playwright-core package.
bugs.fix: Verified the password gate via HTTP-level checks instead: unauthenticated redirect, login page password input render, and signed-cookie access to /tr.

bugs.error_message: Error [ERR_UNSUPPORTED_ESM_URL_SCHEME]: On Windows, absolute paths must be valid file:// URLs. Received protocol 'c:'
bugs.root_cause: The script tried to dynamic-import a Windows absolute path without converting it to a file:// URL.
bugs.fix: Removed the TS module import from the verification script and generated the signed cookie inline with Web Crypto.
